modules.name: workflow-executor
modules.responsibility: Main orchestration: buildConservativePlan(), executeSingleStep(), executeWorkflow(), pause flag

modules.name: index
modules.responsibility: Extension entry point: registers workflow tool, /workflow commands, keybindings (Ctrl+H pause, Ctrl+J resume)

modules.name: workflow-spec
modules.responsibility: YAML parsing: WorkflowSpec from .workflow.yaml files, including completion field and artifacts

modules.name: expression
modules.responsibility: ${{ }} expression evaluator: property access, pipe filters (duration, currency, json), resolveExpressions()

modules.name: dispatch
modules.responsibility: Subprocess spawn: pi --mode json, model override, tool filtering, extension/skill scoping, session log capture, usage accumulation

modules.name: step-loop
modules.responsibility: Loop iteration with accumulated evidence, receives dispatchAgent callback, onExhausted handling

modules.name: state
modules.responsibility: Run directory initialization, state persistence via atomic write (tmp + rename), metrics tracking

modules.name: dag
modules.responsibility: Dependency graph: buildPlanFromDeps(), conservative plan adds implicit sequential deps for steps without explicit refs

modules.name: types
modules.responsibility: All shared interfaces: WorkflowSpec, StepSpec, AgentSpec, ExecutionState, StepResult, WorkflowResult, CompletionSpec, ExpressionScope

modules.name: step-parallel
modules.responsibility: executeParallelLayer() + executeParallelStep(), receives executeSingleStep callback

modules.name: step-shared
modules.responsibility: Shared utilities: zeroUsage(), addUsage(), buildPrompt(), persistStep(), compileAgentSpec(), constants

modules.name: checkpoint
modules.responsibility: findIncompleteRun(), validateResumeCompatibility(), computeResumePoint()

modules.name: tui
modules.responsibility: Progress widget with token display, step status, timing, cost

modules.name: step-gate
modules.responsibility: Async gate execution with process groups, onPass/onFail handling

modules.name: workflow-discovery
modules.responsibility: Directory scanning for .workflow.yaml: project (.pi/workflows/) and user (~/.pi/agent/workflows/)

modules.name: step-agent
modules.responsibility: Agent dispatch with injectable dispatchFn, template compilation, output path resolution

modules.name: template
modules.responsibility: Nunjucks three-tier rendering (project > user > builtin), ${{ }} protection from Nunjucks interpretation

modules.name: completion
modules.responsibility: Completion field resolution: template and message+include forms, resolves against CompletionScope

modules.name: agent-spec
modules.responsibility: YAML agent spec loader: parseAgentYaml, createAgentLoader, three-tier search (.pi/agents/ > ~/.pi/agent/agents/ > package/demo/agents/)

modules.name: schema-validator
modules.responsibility: AJV wrapper: validate(), validateFromFile(), ValidationError class with formatted messages

modules.name: output
modules.responsibility: persistStepOutput(): writes all outputs as JSON, supports author-declared output.path

modules.name: step-transform
modules.responsibility: Pure expression mapping: no LLM invocation, resolves mapping fields via ${{ }}

modules.name: format
modules.responsibility: Shared formatDuration/formatCost utilities

modules.name: step-pause
modules.responsibility: Pause step: returns completed immediately, executor sets status=paused

modules.name: test-helpers
modules.responsibility: Shared mockCtx(), mockPi(), makeSpec() for tests

patterns.name: subprocess-dispatch
patterns.description: Each workflow step spawns pi --mode json as a child process. The main pi instance orchestrates, never yields its own session.

patterns.name: expression-resolution
patterns.description: ${{ }} expressions resolve via property access only — no eval(), no arithmetic. Pipe filters for formatting.

patterns.name: three-tier-search
patterns.description: Resources resolved: .pi/<dir>/ > ~/.pi/agent/<dir>/ > <package>/<dir>/. Used for agents, templates, and workflows.

patterns.name: atomic-state-write
patterns.description: State persisted after each step via tmp file + rename for crash safety.

patterns.name: injectable-dispatch
patterns.description: Step executors receive dispatch functions as callbacks for testability without subprocesses.

patterns.name: conservative-plan
patterns.description: buildConservativePlan() adds implicit sequential deps for steps without explicit ${{ steps.X }} refs. Parallelism is opt-in.

patterns.name: nunjucks-template-composition
patterns.description: Agent prompts compiled through Nunjucks unconditionally. {% extends %}/{% block %} for template inheritance. ${{ }} protected from Nunjucks.

boundaries: Extension owns subprocess dispatch — no dependency on pi-subagents
types.ts is the single source for all shared interfaces — no type definitions elsewhere
Step executors (step-*.ts) receive callbacks, never import workflow-executor directly
Template engine (template.ts) has no dependency on workflow types — pure Nunjucks wrapper
schema-validator.ts is a standalone AJV wrapper — no workflow-specific logic
